conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 10 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Median OS (mo) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for all patients in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="57.6" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="Extracted from the Abstract and SURVIVAL section, confirmed by Figure 1A, stating 'median overall survival was ... with ADT plus docetaxel (combination therapy) ... (57.6 months)'."
  B: value="57.6" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="The median overall survival was 57.6 months with ADT plus docetaxel (combination therapy) as reported in the abstract."

---
Column 2: Median OS (mo) | Overall | Control
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for all patients in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="44.0" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="Extracted from the Abstract and SURVIVAL section, stating 'median overall survival was ... with ADT alone (57.6 months vs. 44.0 months)'."
  B: value="44.0" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="The median overall survival was 44.0 months with ADT alone as reported in the abstract."

---
Column 3: Median OS (mo) | High volume | Treatment
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="49.2" | page=6 | modality=text | reasoning="Extracted from the SURVIVAL section and Figure 1B, stating 'a median overall survival that was 17.0 months longer in the combination group than in the ADT-alone group (49.2 months vs. 32.2 months)'."
  B: value="49.2" | page=6 | modality=figure | reasoning="Figure 1B, 'Patients with High-Volume Disease', shows the median overall survival for ADT+docetaxel as 49.2 months."

---
Column 4: Median OS (mo) | High volume | Control
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="32.2" | page=6 | modality=text | reasoning="Extracted from the SURVIVAL section and Figure 1B, stating 'a median overall survival that was 17.0 months longer in the combination group than in the ADT-alone group (49.2 months vs. 32.2 months)'."
  B: value="32.2" | page=6 | modality=figure | reasoning="Figure 1B, 'Patients with High-Volume Disease', shows the median overall survival for ADT alone as 32.2 months."

---
Column 5: Median OS (mo) | Low volume | Treatment
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for patients with low volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="NR" | page=6 | modality=text | reasoning="Extracted from the SURVIVAL section and Figure 1C, stating 'The median survival at the time of the analysis had not been reached in the subgroup with low-volume disease in either study group'."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Figure 1C, 'Patients with Low-Volume Disease', states 'ADT+docetaxel (median overall survival, NR)' where NR means not reached."

---
Column 6: Median OS (mo) | Low volume | Control
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for patients with low volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="NR" | page=6 | modality=text | reasoning="Extracted from the SURVIVAL section and Figure 1C, stating 'The median survival at the time of the analysis had not been reached in the subgroup with low-volume disease in either study group'."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Figure 1C, 'Patients with Low-Volume Disease', states 'ADT alone (median overall survival, NR)' where NR means not reached."

---
Column 7: Median PFS (mo) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for all patients in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="20.2" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="Extracted from the Abstract and Table 2, stating 'The median time to biochemical, symptomatic, or radiographic progression was 20.2 months in the combination group' and 'Time to castration-resistant prostate cancer - mo* Median 20.2'."
  B: value="20.2" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="The median time to biochemical, symptomatic, or radiographic progression was 20.2 months in the combination group as reported in the abstract."

---
Column 8: Median PFS (mo) | Overall | Control
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for all patients in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="11.7" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="Extracted from the Abstract and Table 2, stating 'The median time to biochemical, symptomatic, or radiographic progression was ... as compared with 11.7 months in the ADT-alone group' and 'Time to castration-resistant prostate cancer - mo* Median 11.7'."
  B: value="11.7" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="The median time to biochemical, symptomatic, or radiographic progression was 11.7 months in the ADT-alone group as reported in the abstract."

---
Column 9: Median PFS (mo) | High volume | Treatment
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Median PFS for high volume metastasis in the treatment arm was not explicitly reported in the provided text, tables, or figures."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Information for median progression-free survival for patients with high volume metastasis in the experimental arm was not found in the provided document pages after targeted searches."

---
Column 10: Median PFS (mo) | High volume | Control
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Median PFS for high volume metastasis in the control arm was not explicitly reported in the provided text, tables, or figures."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Information for median progression-free survival for patients with high volume metastasis in the control arm was not found in the provided document pages after targeted searches."

---
Column 11: Median PFS (mo) | Low volume | Treatment
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for patients with low volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Median PFS for low volume metastasis in the treatment arm was not explicitly reported in the provided text, tables, or figures."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Information for median progression-free survival for patients with low volume metastasis in the experimental arm was not found in the provided document pages after targeted searches."

---
Column 12: Median PFS (mo) | Low volume | Control
Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for patients with low volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Median PFS for low volume metastasis in the control arm was not explicitly reported in the provided text, tables, or figures."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Information for median progression-free survival for patients with low volume metastasis in the control arm was not found in the provided document pages after targeted searches."
